title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Mumbai University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Mumbai University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mumbai University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Mumbai University:
Mumbai University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mumbai University!
